title: Ginn@thown #1599
definition:
Ginnetho or Ginnethon = "gardener"

 1) a priest among the exiles who returned with Zerubbabel and who
    covenanted with Nehemiah
nasbUsage:

 1) a priest among the exiles who returned with Zerubbabel and who
    covenanted with Nehemiah
